hero.title: Ushering in the Next Era of Indian Music
hero.subtitle: Svarit is dedicated to the preservation and promotion of Indian classical music through education, performance, and community engagement.

about.heading: Our Mission is to Inspire Young & Fresh Perspectives to Reshape Indian Music
about.subheading: Svarit was founded in 2001 with the vision of promoting and propagating the rich tradition of Hindustani Raag Sangeet, as envisioned by the legendary vocalist Pandit Dinkar Kaikini.
paragraphs: Svarit, a Sanskrit word meaning “ascending towards the divine”, embodies our belief in music as a pathway to higher artistic and spiritual expression. Founded to preserve and promote the legacy of Indian Music as envisioned by Pandit Dinkar Kaikini, Svarit is rooted in a rich musical lineage that traces through the legacies of the great masters of Hindustani classical music, the likes of Pt. Vishnu Narayan Bhatkhande, Ustad Faiyaz Khan, Padma Bhushan Acharya S. N. Ratanjankar, Ustad Allarakha & Ustad Zakir Hussain.

Today, under the guidance of Pt. Yogesh Samsi and Smt. Aditi Kaikini Upadhya, Svarit is more than a trust. It is a vibrant cultural platform where tradition meets innovation. Through concerts, festivals, educational initiatives, artist development, and collaborative projects, we nurture excellence while ensuring our country's arts remain relevant, accessible, and inspiring for future generations. Svarit continues to celebrate heritage, foster creativity, and shape the future of Indian Music.

initiatives.heading: Engaging Through More than 2 Decades of Keeping Tradition Alive

events.title: Swaramrit
events.description: A 2-day festival featuring vocal recitals by Pt. Dinkar Kaikini, Smt Aditi Kaikini Upadhya, Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar, and Pt. Ajay Chakraborty, concluding with a Santoor solo by Pt. Shivkumar Sharma.

events.title: Chatur Smriti 2003
events.description: An evening of Hindustani music featuring a Flute recital by Pt. Hariprasad Chaurasia and a classical vocal performance by Pt. Dinkar Kaikini.

events.title: Chatur Smriti 2004
events.description: A 2-day event presenting a Sitar recital by Shri Purbayan Chatterjee, Dhrupad by Pt. Uday Bhawalkar and vocal performances by Ustad Rashid Khan and Pt. Dinkar Kaikini.

events.title: Sujan Smriti (Pune)
events.description: Svarit's special Pune edition featuring Kathak by Smt Shama Bhate, a Sitar recital by Shri Kushal Das, and classical vocal by Pt. Dinkar Kaikini.

events.title: Dinarang
events.description: A curated showcase of choral compositions directed by Smt Aditi Kaikini Upadhya, alongside solo vocal performances by Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar and Pt. Ajay Chakraborty.

events.title: Chatursmriti 2008
events.description: A classical double-bill featuring a Sitar recital by Pt. Kushal Das and a soulful vocal performance by Pt. Ajay Chakrabarty.

events.title: Chatursmriti 2009
events.description: A 2-day festival featuring legendary Santoor maestro Pt. Shivkumar Sharma, alongside recitals by Smt Shubha Mudgal, Shri Rakesh Chaurasia, and Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar.

events.title: “Dinarang” Film Screening
events.description: A special cinematic event hosted by Svarit, presenting a documentary film screening that explores the life, philosophy, and musical legacy of Pandit Dinkar Kaikini.

events.title: Chatursmriti 2011
events.description: An evening pairing instrumental and vocal disciplines, featuring a Sitar recital by Shri Purbayan Chatterjee and a classical vocal performance by Smt Aditi Kaikini Upadhya.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2012
events.description: A 2-day event featuring a Tabla solo by Ustad Zakir Hussain, a Sitar recital by Ustad Shahid Parvez, vocal recital by Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar, and the release of the "Dinarang" book translation.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2013
events.description: A 2-day celebration featuring a percussion ensemble with Shri Ranjit Barot, a violin duet by Ganesh-Kumaresh, and vocal recitals by Smt Ashwini Bhide and Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2014
events.description: A 2-day festival featuring Dhrupad by Pt. Uday Bhawalkar, Sitar by Pt. Budhaditya Mukherjee, "Sumiran" a Kathak choreography, a Tabla solo by Pt. Yogesh Samsi, and vocal recital by Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2015
events.description: A vibrant evening of classical performing arts, showcasing a Kathak dance recital by Pt. Rajendra Gangani followed by a Flute solo by maestro Pt. Hariprasad Chaurasia.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2016
events.description: A 2-day event featuring a vocal duet by Pt. Rajan & Pt. Sajan Mishra, solo recitals by Smt Aditi Kaikini Upadhya and Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar, and Santoor recital by Shri Rahul Sharma.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2017
events.description: A 2-day festival presenting a Violin recital by Dr Smt N Rajam, Sitar by Shri Niladri Kumar, and vocal performances by Pt. Raghunandan Panshikar and Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2018
events.description: A 2-day gathering featuring choral works by Pt. Dinkar Kaikini, Flute by Pt. Ronu Majumdar, Sarod by Pt. Debojyoti Bose, and vocal recital by Pt. Venkatesh Kumar and Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2019
events.description: A 2-day event highlighting a unique Tabla Jugalbandi by Pt. Shubhankar Banerjee and Pt. Yogesh Samsi, a Sarod-Violin duet, and vocal recital by Smt Aditi Kaikini Upadhya and Pt. Ulhas Kashalkar.

events.title: Dinarang Smriti 2020
events.description: A landmark concert featuring an opening vocal recital by Pt. Ajay Chakrabarty, followed by an extraordinary performance by Pt. Shivkumar Sharma accompained by Ustad Zakir Hussain.

workshops.title: Samvāda
workshops.description: A two-day music workshop on Hindustani classical vocal music conducted by Vidushi Aditi Upadhya.

workshops.title: Understanding Dinarang Through His Music
workshops.description: A 5-day residential Hindustani vocal workshop at Anubhav, Wayanad for students and performers by Vidushi Aditi Upadhya.

workshops.title: Riyaaz Shibir
workshops.description: A 2-day residential shibir at Anubhav, Wayanad for students focusing on various aspects of riyaaz by Vidushi Aditi Upadhya.

workshops.title: Lecture Demonstration on the Punjab Gharana
workshops.description: An educational lecture demonstration exploring the history and technical complexities of the Punjab Gharana of Tabla, presented by Pt. Sushilkumar Jain.

workshops.title: Workshop with Vidwan Karaikudi Mani Iyer
workshops.description: A mridangam workshop with the eminent maestro Vidwan Karaikudi Mani Iyer.

workshops.title: An Evening with Vidwan Umayalpuram K Sivaraman
workshops.description: An evening of interaction, learning and experience with the legendary mridangam maestro Padma Vibhushan Vidwan Umayalpuram K Sivaraman, hosted by Ranjit Barot and Yogesh Samsi at Bhartiya Vidya Bhavan, Chowpatty, Mumbai.

donate.heading: Join us in shaping the future of Indian Music.

sponsors.heading: The Champions of Our Mission So Far

contact.heading: We'd Love to Hear from You
contact.description: We are a community of dreamers & changemakers. What began as a family endeavour is now expanding to welcome fresh perspectives. If you resonate with our mission, please get in touch.

footer.address: Anandashram, 22 Pandita Ramabai Rd, Gamdevi, Mumbai - 400 007
